title: catalog-meta
description: Machine-readable metadata written by okhp3-skill-cataloger alongside the output file on every successful run. Written to .agents/skills/.catalog-meta.json in catalog mode, or .catalog-meta.json at repo root in full index mode.

last_indexed.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the last successful run. Example: 2026-06-23T18:10:00Z

skill_count.description: Total number of skills found and indexed in this run.

mode.description: Scan mode used: project (flat layout in .agents/skills/) or library (categorized layout).

surface.description: Which surface was indexed. project-skills = .agents/skills/ (catalog mode). distribution = root family folders (--full mode).

indexed_by.description: Name and version of the cataloger script. Example: okhp3-skill-cataloger v1.5.0

repo.description: Repository name. Defaults to the current working directory name. Override with --repo-name.
